security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://api.github.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://ai-nse.openai.azure.com https://oauth2.googleapis.com https://sheets.googleapis.com; frame-src 'self' blob: data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.longDescription: Echelon Daycare Society receipt generator and parent roster manager.
